sentences.text: Hans explained, 'I plan to take them to the market to sell them to the Burgomaster’s daughter and use the money to buy back my wheelbarrow.'
The Miller asked, 'Buy back your wheelbarrow?'
He was surprised and said, 'You don't mean to say you have sold it?'
The Miller thought it was a silly decision and said, 'What a very stupid thing to do!'
